title: Back-to-back defeats for Badgers women
description: REGIONAL NEWS - The Six Gun Grill Garden...
bodyText:
REGIONAL NEWS - The Six Gun Grill Garden Route Badgers women faced another tough weekend in the Cricket South Africa Hollywoodbets Pro series after they lost both the Pro50 and Pro20 matches against the DP World Lions.


> In the series of matches that were played at the Wanderers in Johannesburg, the Lions won the 50-over match by a commanding 116 runs and the T20 match by 42 runs.


The Badgers will now need to go back to the drawing board before their next series of matches, which will be played against the Dolphins in Durban over the weekend of 16 and 17 November.

The summarised score cards are:

Pro50 match

Lions 299/8 - 50 overs: (Sunette Viljoen Louw 95, Fay Cowling 82, Jema Evan 25, Diara Rumlakan 25, Julandi Saaiman 4/35)

Garden Route Badgers 183/9 - 50 overs: (Nicolien Janse van Rensburg 60, Mochelle May 58, Jana Nell 24, Fay Cowling 4/31)

DP World Lions won by 116 runs

Pro 20 match

Lions 141/10 - 19.5 overs: (Shabnim Ismail 37, Jana Nell 2/18, Micaela Andrews 2/18, Faith de Jonck 2/29, Gizelle Augusta Abrahams 2/29)

Garden Route Badgers 99/9 - 20 overs: (Vuyolwethu Bonya 23, Nicolene Janse van Rensburg 20, Shabnim Ismail 3/19, Madison Landsman 2/3, Relebohile Mkhize 2/15, Fay Cowling 2/18)

DP Lions won by 42 runs

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
